metadata.name: Handle a Partial Payment on an Invoice

description: A customer makes a partial payment on an invoice. An agent must apply it and follow up on the remaining balance.

nodes.task_description: Receive a payment that is less than the full invoice amount.

expected_outcome.value: The system flags the partial payment.

nodes.task_description: Apply the partial payment to the invoice.

expected_outcome.value: The invoice now shows a remaining balance due.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer to inquire about the short payment and arrange for payment of the remaining balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent contacts the customer to resolve the issue.
